---
title: "LDAP Authentication"
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

## LDAP Authentication

LDAP authentication is handled by Apache in front of Shiny. The app trusts the authenticated user only when `AUTH_MODE=ldap` and Apache has canonicalized the request to `/ms-app/?auth_user=<user>`.

## App Runtime

Set this in `/srv/shiny-server/ms-app/.Renviron`:

```ini
AUTH_MODE=ldap
TRUST_PROXY_AUTH_USER_QUERY=1
```

Restart Shiny:

```bash
sudo systemctl restart shiny-server
```

## Apache Template

Use:

```bash
scripts/ms-vm-shiny-443.conf
```

The template:

- protects `/ms-app/` with LDAP
- removes user-controlled auth headers
- sets `X-Remote-User` and `X-Forwarded-User`
- rewrites authenticated requests to `/ms-app/?auth_user=<REMOTE_USER>`
- proxies websocket traffic to Shiny Server

## Smoke Test

```bash
curl -Ik -u USER https://mscf-vm.biochem.mpg.de/ms-app/
```

Expected result: `302` to `/ms-app/?auth_user=USER`, followed by `200` after redirects.

## Local Simulation

```r
Sys.setenv(AUTH_MODE = "ldap", TRUST_PROXY_AUTH_USER_QUERY = "1")
shiny::runApp("ms-app")
```

Open:

```text
http://127.0.0.1:3838/?auth_user=yeroslaviz
```
